name: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
original_name: Jakers! The Adventures of Piggley Winks
overview: The adventures of Piggley, a spunky eight-year-old pig, and his friends Dannan the Duck and Ferny the Bull on Raloo Farm in Ireland.
